description.line1: The application provides the exact times of iftar and suhur, which are calculated automatically according to the user's geographical location.

errors.loadCity: Could not load data for selected city.

dua.title: The dua of the fasting person after breaking the fast
dua.author: – Shaykh Abdur-Razzaq Al-Badr
dua.transliteration: Dhahaba az-zama’u wabtallatil-‘urooq, wa thabatal-ajru in shaa’ Allah
dua.translation: "The thirst has gone, the veins are moistened, and the reward is confirmed, In shaa Allah."
dua.niyyahQuestion: Is there any phrase to make the intention for fasting?
